name: Almost as Good as Sex Cake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen strawberry halves, thawed in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package instructions.
2. Bake the mixture in a 9x13-inch pan and allow it to cool completely.
3. Using the handle of a wooden spoon, poke holes evenly throughout the cooled cake.
4. Pour the sweetened condensed milk evenly over the cake and into the holes.
5. Thaw the strawberries in syrup and mix them with the strawberry ice cream topping until well combined.
6. Spoon the strawberry-ice cream mixture evenly over the cake and into the holes.
7. Spread the whipped topping evenly over the top of the cake.
8. Chop the cocktail salted peanuts and sprinkle them on top of the whipped topping.
9. Refrigerate the cake for at least 1 hour before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
